title: Evangelion theme phone
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion theme phone             Quote Post by omega2236 » Tue May 08, 2012 8:57 am Hi guys! So I got a new phone a few weeks back, and being a huge Eva fan I was wondering if anyone knew of a site were I could upload wallpapers and ring tones. I would love to have Ramiel's scream as a text receiver.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue May 08, 2012 11:25 am I don't know of any except from all of the usual places you can get to from a google search , but if you have an android phone, I've written a simple live wallpaper that mimicks the Magi attack display from EoE .

[]:             Quote Post by omega2236 » Wed May 23, 2012 8:58 am That live wallpaper you did is awesome. Nice work on your part. The thing I really like about it is that only Eva fans will get this when they see it. I think you should do a few more really. Like a shape changing Ramiel. How about a shifting A.T. field or a corrupting Ireul? No I got it! A Clockiel that tells time. I wish I could make them myself. Other than that I found other wallpapers and a few ring tones. Nothing special. I made my own notification tone of Ramiel's scream. Scared a few of my coworkers with it.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jun 03, 2012 1:09 am Can you produce anything that would work with a samsung?

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Jun 07, 2012 12:53 pm When I was stuck in Droid land I had a pretty badass Eva clock widget that looked like the Active Time Countdown clock. That was pretty cool. Of course, it was Android, so the clock never quite matched up with the one on the widget. Also that shit is stupid and hurts your battery life. Your best bet is to get an iPhone and some tasteful background, and maybe one of the bajillion Evangelion iPhone cases.
